rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ELMO LEE CARTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the deadline for providing the proposed order and courtesy copies of any responsive papers was 12/31/24, not 1/8/25, the representative capacity of the petitioner was missing in item 1 of the Notice of Hearing, the complete title of the pleading to be heard was incorrectly set forth in item 1 of the Notice of Hearing, the belatedly filed "Responses to the Tentative Ruling," etc., was not verified by the Court-appointed fiduciary, as required by Probate Code Section 1023 and CRC 7.103(c), and the "responses" merely attached copies of prior filings. Finally, the receipt signed by Elvin B. Carter was apparently signed by him, individually, not as the trustee of Hattie Ross Living Trust dated December 22, 2020, as ordered. (A petitioner should supplement or amend his/her/their petition to either provide additional information or to correct statements in the petition, respectively, not to "clear notes" or to "respond" to issues. Correct proofs of service or proposed orders should be filed or provided separately, not attached to a supplement or amendment.)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: SUNNY NG MITCHELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION Petition For Order Enforcing Power Of Attorney And For Fees Against Chase Bank For Refusal To Honor Power Of Attorney
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required for the Court to determine whether to take this petition off calendar for lack of progress, as the following issues (see tentative ruling for 09/11/2024 hearing) remain unaddressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) No DE-120 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. 3) No proof of service on Chase and Tweedy Browne is on file. Each respondent must be served in the manner required by Probate Code section 4544(b) and CCP sections 413.10 et seq. applicable to a civil summons. 4) The principal's current address must be provided by a verified allegation. 5) Has the petitioner furnished an affidavit under section 4305 to either respondent? If so, please file a copy. 6) Did the principal own the Chase or Tweedy Browne account when the principal's trust was created in December 1999? If so, did the trust instrument (including its schedule, attachment, or exhibit) or general assignment of property (if any) confirm either account as an asset of the trust? PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE GRETA M. GORDON REVOCABLE TRUST DATED NOV 3, TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To 1: Determine Validity Of Trust Amendment; 2) Preclude The Use Of Trust Funds To Defend Trust Contest
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following procedural issues remain: 1) No notice was given to the Attorney General (Probate Code Section 17203(3). 2) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court. Any party lodging a proposed order in a contested matter must file proof of service of the proposed order on all parties entitled to notice of the petition (San Francisco Local Rule 14.7.A(4)). Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PATRICIA A. NOBLE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will dated 10/1/2015. [Probate Code Section 8225.] No appearance is required, although the petitioner's verification of her supplement filed on 12/6/24 was incomplete. Status hearing will be set for 2/2/26. If a petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration is filed at least two weeks before 2/2/26, no appearance will be required on that date. NB: A supplement filed to provide additional information should not "answer" issues raised by the court; it should just provide the missing information. A new proof of service should just be filed and a proposed order should just be provided, not attached to a supplement.
